excluded_categories.reason: No user input handling beyond email/password, no authentication, permission, or data persistence details specified.
No roles or permission model defined in the requirement.
No UI behavior, messages, loading state, or empty state mentioned.

scenario_generation_rules: Generate positive test cases for successful account creation with valid email and password meeting minimum length.
Generate negative test cases for duplicate email (uniqueness violation) and password shorter than 8 characters.
Generate validation test cases for email uniqueness check before creation and password length validation.
Generate boundary test cases for password length exactly 8 characters and just below 8 characters.

Do not include any test cases for email format validation, password complexity beyond length, email verification, error messages, case sensitivity, maximum lengths, or character restrictions as these are not specified in the requirement.
